title: Acetosella incarnata
taxonomy: Acetosella incarnata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It belongs to the genus Acetosella, which is a group of plants known for their acidic properties. Acetosella incarnata is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is also known as the "purple wood sorrel" due to its characteristic purple flowers and leaves. This plant is often found in shaded areas and is known for its ability to thrive in acidic soil conditions.
